title: A liner, an assembly, a vehicle and a method for producing a liner
abstract: The invention relates to a liner (10) for mounting an object (200) on a vehicle (1), the liner (10) being adapted to be arranged between the object (200) and an element for holding the object (120, 120', 120''), the liner (10) comprising a first side (12), wherein the liner (10) is adapted to be arranged with the first side (12) facing the object (200) to be mounted. The liner (10) comprises integrated protrusions (16) on the first side (12), wherein the protrusions (16) comprises a coating (18) having a lower coefficient of friction than the liner (10). The invention also relates to an assembly (100) comprising a liner (10), a vehicle (1) comprising such an assembly (100), and a method for producing a liner (10).
claims: Claims Claims 1 . A liner (10) for mounting an object (200) on a vehicle (1 ), the liner (10) being adapted to be arranged between the object (200) and an element for holding the object (120, 120', 120"), the liner (10) comprising a first side (12), wherein the liner (10) is adapted to be arranged with the first side (12) facing the object (200) to be mounted, characterized in that the liner (10) comprises integrated protrusions (16) on the first side (12), wherein the protrusions (16) comprises a coating (18) having a lower coefficient of friction than the liner (10). 2. The liner (10) according to claim 1 , wherein the protrusions (16) are ridges extending longitudinally along the length (L) of the liner (10). 3. The liner (10) according to claim 1 or 2, wherein the protrusions (16) have an essentially rectangular cross-section. 4. The liner (10) according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein the coating (18) is a fluoropolymer, glue, or paint. 5. The liner (10) according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein the coating (18) has a coefficient of friction which is smaller than 0.2. 6. The liner (10) according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein the protrusions (16) occupy between 1 -40% of the first side (12) of the liner (10). 7. The liner (10) according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein the liner (10) comprises plastics or rubber. 8. An assembly (100) for mounting an object (200) on a vehicle (1 ), the assembly (100) comprising at least one element for holding the object (120, 120', 120"), characterized in that the assembly (100) further comprises at least one liner (10) according to any one of claims 1 -7. 9. The assembly (100) according to claim 8, wherein the assembly (100) comprises a first element for holding the object (120') and a second element for holding the object (120"), wherein the first element (120') is a mounting bracket and the second element (120") is a mounting strap. 10. A vehicle (1 ) characterized in that it comprises an object (200) to be mounted and an assembly (100) according to any of claims 8-9 for mounting the object (200) on the vehicle (1 ). 1 1 . A method for producing a liner (10) for mounting an object (200) on a vehicle (1 ), the method comprising: - forming (s101 ) a liner (10) comprising integrated protrusions (16) on a first side (12) of the liner (10); and - treating (s102) the protrusions (16) with a coating (18) having a lower coefficient of friction than the liner (10). 12. The method according to claim 1 1 , wherein treating (s102) the protrusions (16) with a coating (18) comprises conveying the liner (10) through a bath with the coating (18).
